title: Notifications Bundle

source_items.title: Channel adapter pattern for multi-channel notifications
Cron-based scheduled triggers for recurring actions
Webhook trigger endpoints for external event-driven dispatch
Rule-based alerting engine with multi-channel dispatch
Cron-scheduled automation workflows with report modes
Persistent typed notification system with dashboard API
Cross-platform desktop notifications for agent completion
Webhook receiver for push-based issue ingestion from Linear and GitHub

grouping_rationale: All eight issues converge on the same event-ingress -> scheduling/rule evaluation -> channel delivery -> persisted operator notification path, with shared verification around webhooks, cron execution, and operator-facing visibility.
architectural_drift: Notification delivery today is Slack-webhook-centric but already wrapped in NotificationChannel and NotificationManager, so adapter and desktop-channel work extends an existing seam rather than replacing it.

Linear webhook verification, durable inbox persistence, and webhook health tracking already exist, so issues #262 and #315 are follow-up generalization work rather than the first webhook surface in the repo.

The repo already persists webhook deliveries and exposes operator APIs, but it does not yet have a typed persistent notification store, a cron scheduler, or a rule engine that ties ingress events to operator-visible history and alert routing.
